title: Implements 12 MCP tools with cross-dataset dedup and team-name normalization beyond the minimal spec
evidence: src/server.ts registers 12 tools (find_matches..brazilian_players_by_club); src/dataLoader.ts:192 mergeBrasileiraoSources and :212 dedupeBrFootball avoid double-counting overlapping seasons; src/normalize.ts:28 parseTeamName strips state suffixes and folds accents

title: Code-quality/maintainability scores are moderate, not perfect
suggestion: Minor: the layered query modules are large but readable; no action required for conformance.

title: Standings computed from raw match results, not hardcoded
evidence: src/queries/competitionQueries.ts:20 standings() accumulates points as wins*3+draws (:55) and sorts by points/GD/GF (:58)
